page: Microsoft Azure NV16as_v4 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the NVSv4 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 AMD processor architecture. The instance is equipped with 56.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory allocation of 3.5 GB per core. For accelerated workloads, it includes a fractional GPU allocation of 0.5 GPU. Local storage is provided via a 360 GB drive, and the instance is capable of utilizing Premium Storage.

The inclusion of a fractional GPU makes this instance a cost-efficient option for workloads that require GPU acceleration but do not demand a full dedicated GPU card, optimizing resource density and hardware costs. The 16 dedicated vCPUs and 56.0 GB of RAM provide a balanced resource profile. This virtual machine is designed for workloads such as virtual desktops, entry-level 3D visualization, CAD applications, and general-purpose tasks requiring moderate graphics acceleration. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.
description: Microsoft Azure NV16as_v4 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the NVSv4 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs, 56.0 GB of system memory, and a 360 GB local storage drive. The instance is Premium Storage capable and includes a fractional GPU allocation of 0.5 GPU. This hardware configuration is designed to offer a cost-efficient entry point for GPU-accelerated workloads without the expense of a full dedicated GPU. It is suited for virtual desktop infrastructure, moderate 3D rendering, CAD applications, and general-purpose workloads requiring graphical acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NV16as_v4 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 16 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 56 GB RAM, 360 GB local storage, and a fractional 0.5 GPU for cost-efficient graphics-accelerated workloads.

tagline: An x86_64 virtual machine featuring sixteen dedicated cores, balanced memory, local storage, and fractional GPU acceleration for cost-efficient graphical workloads.
bullet_points: 56.0 GB system memory with 3.5 GB per core
Fractional 0.5 GPU allocation for cost-efficient acceleration
360 GB local storage with Premium Storage capability
Optimized for virtual desktops, CAD, and moderate 3D visualization
